title: myosotis palustris proles commutata
intro: Myosotis palustris proles commutata, also known as the marsh forget-me-not, is a plant species within the genus Myosotis and is a variation of the common forget-me-not (Myosotis palustris). The medicinal properties of Myosotis palustris proles commutata include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Myosotis palustris proles commutata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
